title: Update your kept bird record
body: "You must confirm your details and the details of the birds you keep to the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA) every 12 months.  If your details or the details of birds you keep have changed, you must tell APHA within 30 days. This includes when you:   change your contact details no longer keep or own birds change the species or number of birds you keep change your main purpose for keeping birds   Start now   Other ways to update your record  You can also update your bird record by:   email: poultryupdates@apha.gov.uk  phone: 03000 200 301 – lines are open 8:30am to 5:00pm Monday to Friday   If you’re not registered  If you’re not already registered with APHA, find out how to register as a bird keeper.  Get help  For help using the service, email: poultryupdates@apha.gov.uk  "
